title: Prism Projection
description: Geographic projection configuration for geoshape and geopoint marks.

type.description: Projection family. Mercator/equirectangular/naturalearth are world-friendly; albers_usa lays Alaska+Hawaii as insets; orthographic shows a globe view.

scale.description: Projection scale (pixels per radian). Defaults to auto-fit when unset.

center.description: [longitude, latitude] in degrees the projection centers on.

rotate.description: [lambda, phi, gamma] rotation in degrees. Orthographic honours all three; others honour the first two.

translate.description: [x, y] pixel-space origin. Defaults to the plot centre when unset.

tier.description: Geodata resolution + admin tier the feature lookup pulls from. Defaults to world-110m.
